Custom Sintra Signs for Professional Indoor Displays

Create professional indoor signage with our custom Sintra signs, perfect for business displays, trade show exhibits, and commercial applications. Made from durable PVC Sintra board, these lightweight yet sturdy signs deliver crisp, vibrant printing for your indoor advertising needs.

Our Sintra signs are ideal for retail displays, office signage, trade show booths, and any indoor application where you need professional-quality signage that maintains its appearance over time. The smooth, white PVC surface provides excellent print quality and color reproduction.

Available in custom sizes from 6" to 48" in both dimensions, you can create the perfect sized sign for your specific application. Whether you need small desk displays or large trade show graphics, our Sintra signs deliver professional results.

  • Lightweight yet durable PVC construction
  • Excellent for indoor commercial applications
  • Smooth surface for superior print quality
  • Custom sizes available up to 48"
  • Professional trade show display quality
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Sintra Sign Material for Indoor Commercial Displays

Our Sintra signs are manufactured using premium PVC Sintra board, a lightweight yet durable material specifically designed for professional indoor signage applications.

Sintra Board Specifications

  • Material: Expanded PVC (Sintra board)
  • Thickness: 3mm (.118")
  • Weight: Lightweight for easy handling and mounting
  • Surface: Smooth, white finish for optimal print quality
  • Durability: Long-lasting indoor performance

Material Benefits

  • Excellent dimensional stability
  • Easy to cut, drill, and mount
  • Smooth surface accepts high-quality digital printing
  • Chemical resistant and easy to clean
  • Ideal for professional indoor environments

Sintra board provides the perfect balance of durability and workability for indoor business signage, trade show displays, and commercial applications where professional appearance is essential.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing & Mounting Options for Sintra Business Signs

Customize your Sintra signs with professional finishing options to match your specific display requirements and mounting needs.

Printing Options

  • Full-color digital printing
  • High-resolution output up to 1440 DPI
  • Vibrant, fade-resistant inks
  • Edge-to-edge printing capability

Mounting Solutions

  • Corner drilling for wall mounting
  • Center hole drilling available
  • Adhesive backing options
  • Stand-offs for dimensional mounting
  • Frame-ready edges

Edge Finishing

  • Clean-cut edges (standard)
  • Rounded corners available
  • Beveled edges for premium appearance

Our finishing options ensure your Sintra signs integrate seamlessly with your display environment and mounting requirements.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Sintra Sign Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production schedules to meet your timeline requirements for Sintra sign projects.

Express Production - 2 Business Days

  • Fast turnaround for urgent projects
  • Same high-quality printing standards
  • Perfect for trade show deadlines
  • Express shipping options available

Standard Production - 3 Business Days

  • Most popular production timeline
  • Balances speed with cost efficiency
  • Includes quality inspection process
  • Suitable for most business timelines

Saver Production - 5 Business Days

  • Most economical production option
  • Ideal for non-urgent projects
  • Same quality as faster options
  • Best value for budget-conscious orders

All production times begin after artwork approval and payment processing. We'll provide proofs for your review to ensure your Sintra signs meet your exact specifications before production begins.

For large quantities or special requirements, request a custom quote for the most competitive pricing on your Sintra sign project.

Shipping Options for Custom Sintra Sign Delivery

We provide reliable shipping options to ensure your Sintra signs arrive safely and on schedule for your business needs.

Shipping Methods Available

  • Ground shipping (3-7 business days)
  • Express shipping (2-3 business days)
  • Overnight delivery available
  • Local delivery in select markets
  • Freight shipping for large orders

Packaging & Protection

  • Protective packaging for all Sintra signs
  • Rigid backing to prevent bending
  • Moisture-resistant wrapping
  • Corner protection for larger signs
  • Fragile handling for express shipments

Delivery Considerations

  • Signature required for orders over $100
  • Business address delivery recommended
  • Tracking information provided for all shipments
  • Insurance included on all orders

Shipping costs are calculated based on size, weight, and destination. Larger Sintra signs may require freight shipping for safe delivery.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Indoor Business & Trade Show Uses for Sintra Signs

Sintra signs are versatile indoor signage solutions perfect for professional business environments and commercial applications.

Trade Show & Event Applications

  • Trade show booth displays and graphics
  • Conference room signage and presentations
  • Event sponsorship displays
  • Exhibition booth backdrops
  • Product showcase displays

Business & Retail Applications

  • Office lobby signs and branding
  • Retail store displays and promotions
  • Menu boards for restaurants and cafes
  • Directory signs for buildings
  • Point-of-sale displays

Professional Office Uses

  • Meeting room identification
  • Department and directional signage
  • Company policy displays
  • Safety and compliance signs
  • Recognition and award displays

The professional appearance and durability of Sintra signs make them ideal for any indoor commercial environment where quality presentation matters.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Sintra Sign Printing

Ensure optimal print quality for your Sintra signs by following our artwork guidelines and file preparation requirements.

File Format Requirements

  • PDF files preferred (high-resolution)
  • AI, EPS, or PSD files accepted
  • JPEG or PNG for photographic content
  • Minimum 300 DPI resolution required
  • CMYK color mode for accurate color matching

Design Specifications

  • Include 0.125" bleed on all sides
  • Keep important text 0.25" from edges
  • Use high-contrast colors for readability
  • Embed all fonts or convert to outlines
  • Actual size artwork preferred

Color Matching Services

  • Digital color proof system available
  • Pantone color matching for brand consistency
  • Hard proof options for critical color matching
  • Color correction services available

Design Services Available

  • Professional design assistance
  • Logo recreation and enhancement
  • Layout and formatting help
  • Brand compliance consulting

Our design team can assist with artwork preparation to ensure your Sintra signs achieve the professional quality your business demands.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Sintra Signs for Your Business Today

Ready to create professional indoor signage that represents your brand with quality and style? Our custom Sintra signs deliver the durability and professional appearance your business needs for trade shows, office displays, and commercial applications.

With our easy online ordering system, fast production times, and expert customer service, getting your custom Sintra signs has never been easier. Choose from our flexible production schedules to meet your timeline, and take advantage of our professional design services if you need artwork assistance.

Why Choose Our Sintra Signs?

  • Premium PVC Sintra board material
  • Professional-quality digital printing
  • Custom sizes up to 48" available
  • Fast production and reliable shipping
  • Expert customer service and support
  • Competitive pricing with volume discounts

Get started by selecting your size and options above, or contact our team for a custom quote on larger projects. We're here to help you create the perfect Sintra signs for your business needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Sintra Signs

What material are Sintra signs made from?

Our Sintra signs are made from expanded PVC (polyvinyl chloride) board, commonly known as Sintra board. This material is lightweight, durable, and provides an excellent smooth surface for high-quality digital printing. The 3mm thickness offers good rigidity while remaining easy to handle and mount.

How long do Sintra signs last indoors?

When used indoors, Sintra signs can last many years without significant degradation. The PVC material is resistant to moisture, chemicals, and normal wear. The digital printing we use is fade-resistant and designed for long-term indoor display applications.

What sizes are available for custom Sintra signs?

We offer custom sizes from 6" to 48" in both height and width dimensions. You can create any rectangular size within these parameters. For larger sizes or special requirements, contact us for a custom quote to discuss your specific needs.

Can you drill holes for mounting in Sintra signs?

Yes, we can drill mounting holes in your Sintra signs. Options include corner holes for wall mounting, center holes for specific mounting systems, or custom hole patterns based on your requirements. Specify your hole preferences when placing your order.

What is the difference between Sintra and other sign materials?

Sintra (expanded PVC) is lighter than solid materials like aluminum or wood, yet more durable than paper-based materials. It's easy to cut, drill, and mount, making it ideal for indoor applications where you need professional appearance with practical installation options.

Do you offer design services for Sintra signs?

Yes, we offer professional design services if you need help creating artwork for your Sintra signs. Our design team can work with your ideas, logos, and content to create professional layouts that work well for your intended application.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
